ItacAcademyItem.Name: Incogniti (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Also called Oscuri academy. Alessio Narbone dates the foundation of the Incogniti academy to 1673. See Alessio narbone, Bibliografia Sicola Sistematica, Palermo, 1850.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
